title: Battery Thermal Drift Response
content: If battery temperature exceeds threshold repeatedly, reduce duty cycle, inspect cooling ducts, and schedule maintenance within 24 hours.

title: Motor Current Spike Triage
content: For sustained motor current spikes, inspect load profile, check mechanical resistance, and verify actuator health.

title: Robot 03 Battery Thermal Drift
content: A high severity battery thermal incident on robot-03 was traced to blocked cooling ducts after repeated battery_temp_c threshold crossings.

title: Robot 07 Motor Current Spike
content: A medium severity motor current incident on robot-07 showed motor_current_a spikes caused by conveyor overload and actuator resistance.

title: Network Latency and Packet Loss
content: When network_latency_ms or packet loss spikes, verify uplink congestion, switch port errors, and robot Wi-Fi roaming. Reduce telemetry burst rates during recovery.

title: Elevated Vibration RMS
content: When vibration_rms exceeds baseline, inspect mounts, couplings, and bearing wear; reduce speed until mechanical inspection clears the asset.

title: CPU Thermal Throttle
content: When cpu_temp_c approaches limits, verify fan curves, heatsink torque, and background load; throttle non-critical workloads until thermals stabilize.

title: Robot 12 Vibration Escalation
content: Medium severity vibration_rms on robot-12 correlated with loose motor mount; torque sequence and fastener inspection resolved repeat crossings.
